/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/fast_random1.dir/fast_random1.cpp.o -o fast_random1  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
